search_document:
User Request: Supplier performance.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Supplier Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
Title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
Title: Total Orders by Supplier
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders fulfilled by suppliers
Title: Average Delivery Time
Type: kpi
Description: Average time taken for suppliers to deliver orders
Title: Supplier Rating Distribution
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of supplier ratings based on performance metrics

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Orders by Supplier
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders fulfilled by suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Average Delivery Time
sql_queries.description: Average time taken for suppliers to deliver orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, AVG(julianday(o.ShippedDate) - julianday(o.OrderDate)) AS AvgDeliveryTime FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID WHERE o.ShippedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Supplier Rating Distribution
sql_queries.description: Distribution of supplier ratings based on performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName
